zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Dinham於1449年1月1日出生在英國戴文哈特藍德時，她的父親Sir John de Dinham43歲，母親Joan de Arches37歲。她於1466年與Fulke Bourchier 10th Baron FitzWarin在英國艾可斯坦斯泰德 維利亞結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1516年10月19日在英國英格蘭希迪 本 倫敦享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦克里斯蒂 邱奇 格也福利亞斯 紐蓋特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Dinham于1449年1月1日出生在英国戴文哈特藍德时，她的父亲Sir John de Dinham43岁，母亲Joan de Arches37岁。她于1466年与Fulke Bourchier 10th Baron FitzWarin在英国艾可斯坦斯泰德 維利亞结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1516年10月19日在英国英格兰希迪 本 倫敦享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦克里斯蒂 邱奇 格也福利亞斯 紐蓋特。

nameMeanings.name: Dinham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Dinham was born on 1 January 1449, in Hartland, Devon, England, her father, Sir John de Dinham, was 43 and her mother, Joan de Arches, was 37. She married Fulke Bourchier 10th Baron FitzWarin in 1466, in Stansted Village, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 19 October 1516, in City of London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Dinham est née le 1 janvier 1449, à Hartland, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Dinham, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Joan de Arches, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Fulke Bourchier 10th Baron FitzWarin en 1466, à Stansted Village, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 octobre 1516, à City of London, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Dinham è nata il il 1 gennaio 1449 nel Hartland, Devon, England, sua padre, Sir John de Dinham, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Joan de Arches, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Fulke Bourchier 10th Baron FitzWarin nel 1466, nel Stansted Village, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 19 ottobre 1516, nel City of London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Dinhamが1449年1月1日にイギリスデボンハートランドで生まれた時，父Sir John de Dinhamは43歳，母Joan de Archesは37歳であった。1466年にイギリスエセックススタンステド ヴィラッジでFulke Bourchier 10th Baron FitzWarinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1516年10月19日にイギリスイギリスシトイ オフ ロンドンで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンチリスト チャーチ グレイフリアルズ ニューガトにて埋葬された。

ko.Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 크리스트 c후르치 그리프리아르스 뉴가트
ko.Clifford in Dunsford, Combeinteignhead,: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 코브 인 테익헤드
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Dinham(이)가 1449년 1월 1일 영국 데폰 하틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Dinham(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Arches(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1466년 영국 에세스 스탠스테드 비라지에서 Fulke Bourchier 10th Baron FitzWarin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1516년 10월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 시티 프 런던에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 크리스트 c후르치 그리프리아르스 뉴가트에 묻혔다.

pt.1 January 1449–19 October 1516: 1 de janeiro de 1449–19 de outubro de 1516
pt.London, Middlesex, England: City of London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London: Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Clifford in Dunsford, Combeinteignhead,: Combe in Teignhead, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Dinham nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1449, em Hartland, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Dinham, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Arches, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Fulke Bourchier 10th Baron FitzWarin em 1466, em Stansted Village, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de outubro de 1516, em City of London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London: краист чурч грифрярс нюгэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Clifford in Dunsford, Combeinteignhead,: комб ин тиинид, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Dinham родилась 1 января 1449 г. в местности хартланд, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Dinham было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Arches, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Fulke Bourchier 10th Baron FitzWarin в 1466 г. в местности станстед вилладж, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 19 октября 1516 г. в местности сити оф лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности краист чурч грифрярс нюгэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Dinham nació el 1 de enero de 1449, en Hartland, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Dinham, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Joan de Arches, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Fulke Bourchier 10th Baron FitzWarin en 1466, en Stansted Village, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 19 de octubre de 1516, en City of London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
